results.title: University of Denver to combine some schools, close 5 departments
results.description: The academic restructuring will unfold over the next school year, DU says.

results.title: KTX repositions as investment platform
results.description: Krungthai XSpring Securities (KTX) is accelerating its shift beyond brokerage, transforming this year to expand recurring revenue from non-brokerage businesses amid intensifying fee competition in Thailand's securities industry.

results.title: New $50 Polymarket referral code “OREGON” released for Carolina vs. Vegas NHL Final Game 4 odds
results.description: The Polymarket referral code OREGON has been announced for Tuesday, activating a $50 bonus in California, Washington State, and Oregon. Claim your funds ahead of NHL Stanley Cup Final Game 4 between Vegas and Carolina.

results.title: 'We need you': Global industry insiders, politicians make the case for more Canadian energy
